message:
feat(analytics): add failure mode analytics for hypothesis outcomes

Extend the analytics module with comprehensive failure mode tracking
to help researchers understand patterns in hypothesis outcomes and
improve their research methodology over time.

New types:
- HypothesisOutcome: "falsified" | "robust" | "abandoned" | "in_progress"
- FailureModeDistribution: Counts and rates for each outcome type
- CommonFailures: Operator-correlated failure analysis
- PatternFailures: Structure-based failure pattern detection
- FailureAnalytics: Aggregate container for all failure analytics

New analytics dimensions:

1. byDomain: Failure rates segmented by research domain
   - Tracks which domains have higher hypothesis mortality
   - Helps identify domain-specific methodology gaps

2. byOperator: Correlation between operator usage and outcomes
   - Compares failure rates with/without each operator
   - failureRateDelta shows protective effect of operators
   - Example: "Sessions using Scale-Check have 23% lower failure rate"

3. byHypothesisStructure: Pattern-based failure detection
   - Identifies structural patterns correlated with failure
   - Uses confound template matching for pattern extraction
   - Enables "hypotheses with X structure tend to fail"

4. insights: Auto-generated natural language insights
   - Summarizes key findings from failure analysis
   - Actionable recommendations for methodology improvement

Helper functions:
- normalizeKey(): Case-insensitive domain/tag matching
- safeRate(): Division-safe rate calculation
- extractAutoConfoundTemplateId(): Pattern ID extraction from confounds

Integration:
- PersonalAnalytics interface now includes failureAnalytics field
- Backwards compatible - existing analytics still work

This enables the calibration and self-improvement features described
in the Coach Mode system, helping researchers identify their blind
spots and improve over time.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
